extraction.one_line_summary: MILAN Jonathan won bunch sprint debut after crash at 3.7km split GC contenders, Cavendish caught behind in narrow roads chaos
tactical_patterns: Crash at 3.7km, just 700m before 3km rule protection, deliberately exploited narrow roads to split GC field
LAPEYRA Paul attacked hard on first KOM despite being in break, forcing VERRE back to peloton early
Break caught unusually late at 38km remaining for sprint stage, suggesting leadout teams misjudged chase timing

rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: neutral: held second place at 22 seconds despite GC chaos, suggesting good positioning in finale
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: negative: dropped from 4th to 8th GC after being caught behind 3.7km crash, poor positioning awareness
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: negative: also lost GC places in crash split, revealing positioning weakness in leadup to finale
rider_signals.VINE Jay: negative: caught behind crash despite riding for GC, suggests team positioning inadequate in nervous finale
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: caught in crash despite 16 stage wins experience, indicates diminished bunch positioning ability
rider_signals.MILAN Jonathan: positive: won Grand Tour debut road stage beating established sprinters GROVES and GAVIRIA in reduced bunch
